Welcome.pitch: A new puzzle every day. Sixty seconds on the clock. Keep your streak alive.

types.spotBug: 🐛 Spot the bug in a snippet
types.syntaxSort: 🔀 Sort the lines into a working view

Login.subhead: Sign in to play the daily puzzle and keep your streak across devices.
Login.unconfiguredTitle: Sign-in isn't set up on this deployment yet.
Login.unconfiguredBody: Add the Supabase environment variables to enable accounts. Until then the game runs without sign-in.
Login.checkEmailBody: We sent a magic link to {email}. Open it on this device to sign in.
Login.linkFailed: That link didn't work — try again.
Login.noPassword: No password needed — we'll email you a link that signs you in.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to Swordle!
Onboarding.subhead: A couple of quick things before your first puzzle.
Onboarding.teamPlaceholder: Leave blank if you're flying solo
Onboarding.saveFailed: Couldn't save that — please try again.
Onboarding.serverUnreachable: Couldn't reach the server — please try again.

Game.devPreview: Dev preview · {date} · drop the ?date= param to play today

syntaxSort.hint: Tap a line then tap another to swap them, or use the arrows.
syntaxSort.lineSelected: Line {n}: {text}. Selected. Tap another line to swap.

Game.scorerUnreachable: We couldn't reach the scorer — counted as a miss.

Result.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for a fresh puzzle.
Result.signInCta: 🔥 Sign in to save your streak →

Admin.title: Admin dashboard
Admin.noAccess: You don't have access to this page.
Admin.noData: No data yet — once players sign in and play, this dashboard will fill in.

puzzles.title: Puzzles
puzzles.listEmpty: No puzzles in the database yet — run npm run seed:puzzles.
puzzles.unconfigured: Connect Supabase (service-role key) to manage puzzles.
